description: Step 8: Employee Pages - Refactor Login and ShopHome, create ProductDetail, Redemption, RedemptionSuccess, Orders, OrderDetail, PointsCenter. All pages use services, common components, and follow business rules.
steps: Refactor `src/pages/Login/index.tsx`: Remove the info Alert hint about mock accounts (or keep it conditional on VITE_USE_MOCK). The login already calls useAuthStore.login which now calls authService. Ensure it works with the refactored auth store. Keep existing UI layout unchanged.

Refactor `src/pages/ShopHome/index.tsx`: Remove hardcoded PRODUCTS and CATEGORIES arrays. Use productService.getList() and categoryService.getPublicList() with useEffect/useState. Use the new ProductCard component for rendering. Keep the hero banner. Add category filtering via state. Add pagination support. Navigate to /product/:id on card click. Show loading states. Per BR-F2.

Create `src/pages/ProductDetail/index.tsx`: Route /product/:id. Fetch product by ID via productService.getById(). Display: product image area, name, subtitle, points price (with TollIcon), market price (strikethrough), description, specs table, delivery method, service guarantee. 'Redeem Now' button navigates to /redeem/:id. If stock=0, show sold-out and disable button (BR-F2.4). If user points < product points, disable button with 'Insufficient points' tooltip (BR-F3.1). Show loading skeleton while fetching.

Create `src/pages/Redemption/index.tsx`: Route /redeem/:id. Shows product summary (name, image, points to deduct) at top. Delivery form with: recipientName (required, 2-20 chars), recipientPhone (required, 11-digit starting with 1 per BR-F3.4), recipientAddress (required, 5-200 chars). Validate on submit. Call orderService.create(). Button disabled during submit (BR-F3.5). On success navigate to /redeem/success with order data. On failure show error (BR-F3.7).

Create `src/pages/RedemptionSuccess/index.tsx`: Route /redeem/success. Display success icon (CheckCircle), order number, product name, points deducted. Buttons: 'View Order' (navigate to /orders/:id), 'Continue Shopping' (navigate to /). Use location state to receive order data.

Create `src/pages/Orders/index.tsx`: Route /orders. Fetch user orders via orderService.getMyOrders(). Status filter tabs/chips (all, pending, confirmed, shipping, completed, cancelled) per BR-F4.3. List shows: order number, product name, points amount, status (StatusChip), date. Click navigates to /orders/:id. Pagination. Empty state when no orders. Loading skeleton.

Create `src/pages/OrderDetail/index.tsx`: Route /orders/:id. Fetch order via orderService.getById(). Show: order number, status (StatusChip), product info (name, points, quantity), delivery info (recipient, phone, address), status timeline (created -> confirmed -> shipping -> completed with dates). Back button. Per BR-F4.4.

Create `src/pages/PointsCenter/index.tsx`: Route /points. Fetch balance via pointsService.getBalance() and transactions via pointsService.getTransactions(). Top section: large balance number, totalEarned, totalSpent cards (BR-F5.1). Transaction list with type filter (all, earn, spend, refund, admin_add, admin_deduct) per BR-F5.3. Each transaction shows: type icon/color (BR-F5.2 via StatusChip), description, points (+/-), date. Pagination.
acceptance_criteria: Login page works with refactored authService (no more mock hints or conditional on VITE_USE_MOCK)
ShopHome fetches products/categories from services, uses ProductCard, has category filter and pagination
ProductDetail shows full product info, handles stock=0 and insufficient points states
Redemption page has validated delivery form with phone format check (BR-F3.4), prevents double submit
Orders page has status filter, pagination, uses StatusChip
OrderDetail shows order info with status timeline
PointsCenter shows balance card and filtered transaction list
All pages have loading states and handle empty states
`npm run build` passes with no type errors
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm exit code 0
